ItacPersonItem.Notes: A reputable musician and instrument maker, Dionisi was the founder of the Incatenati academy. See Dell`istorie della città di Verona del signor Girolamo Dalla Corte ..., Volume 3, p. 309.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
